name: blockforge-contracts
description: Composable DeFi Lego — OP_NET smart contracts

scripts.build:vault: asc src/modules/vault/index.ts --config asconfig.json --use abort=src/modules/vault/index/abort -o build/VaultModule.wasm --textFile build/VaultModule.wat
scripts.build:staking: asc src/modules/staking/index.ts --config asconfig.json --use abort=src/modules/staking/index/abort -o build/StakingModule.wasm --textFile build/StakingModule.wat
scripts.build:timelock: asc src/modules/timelock/index.ts --config asconfig.json --use abort=src/modules/timelock/index/abort -o build/TimeLockModule.wasm --textFile build/TimeLockModule.wat
scripts.build:escrow: asc src/modules/escrow/index.ts --config asconfig.json --use abort=src/modules/escrow/index/abort -o build/EscrowModule.wasm --textFile build/EscrowModule.wat
scripts.build:all: npm run build:core && npm run build:vault && npm run build:staking && npm run build:timelock && npm run build:escrow
scripts.deploy:oneclick: npm run build:core && npm run deploy:core
scripts.deploy:all: npm run build:all && npm run deploy:core && npm run deploy:vault && npm run deploy:staking && npm run deploy:timelock && npm run deploy:escrow
